name: Bethel Local Schools
description: Bethel Local Schools is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tipp City, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Duke Park
description: Duke Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Troy, OH. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Elizabeth Township Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Elizabeth Township Community Center in Troy, OH! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Kyle Park
description: Kyle Park is a place to play pickleball in Tipp City, OH. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water. The courts are free.

name: Lincoln Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lincoln Community Center in Troy, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Miami County YMCA Piqua Branch
description: Miami County YMCA Piqua Branch is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Piqua, OH. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Pickleball Plex
description: Pickleball Plex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Piqua, OH. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Robinson Branch YMCA
description: Robinson Branch YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Troy, OH. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Schroeder Tennis Center - Tipp City
description: Come play pickleball at Schroeder Tennis Center - Tipp City in Tipp City, OH! There are 13 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 7 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private.
